_comment: Go/no-go thresholds for each model. Training scripts MUST check these before saving a model as deployment-ready.

router.action_below_minimum: Investigate sampling weights, increase field photo multiplier, retrain
router.notes: Tomato will be weakest due to 89% lab data. Abstention rate calibrated to 95% correct routing on non-abstained.

model2.action_below_minimum: Run model2_simple fallback. If fallback also fails, check data pipeline.
model2.action_below_fallback: Deploy Mode 1 (existing Swin-Tiny 23-class) while collecting more data.
model2.okra_enation_notes: Permanent thin class (288 images, 90% single-source). F1 ceiling 0.55-0.68. needs_verification=true always.
model2.conformal_approximation: Model 2 conformal uses val set (not separate 5% split) — 95% coverage weakened to ~92-94% for thin classes.

model3.action_below_fallback: Deploy Mode 1 (existing Swin-Tiny 23-class) while collecting more Kerala data
model3.tomato_notes: Tomato disease classes are 97-99% lab. Background recomposition mitigates but cannot close the gap fully. Kerala tier-3 F1 is the only honest measure.

kerala_tier3.notes: Val F1 on Bangladesh+scidb+PlantVillage data overstates true Kerala deployment performance. Tier-3 is non-negotiable.
